privileged_info_summary: Floreant POS v1.4 build 1707b is a real, open-source Java POS application using Apache Derby database in embedded mode at /opt/floreantpos/database/derby-server/posdb. The task requires creating a new Menu Group named 'Breakfast Specials' via Back Office > Explorers > Menu Groups > Add. The admin PIN is 1111. The environment uses pre-populated demo restaurant data (not synthetic) with existing menu groups: FAVOURITE, REDS, WHITES, SIDES, JUICES. Menu groups require a Name and Category assignment to be visible on the order-taking screen. The application is built on OpenJDK 11 and the JDBC connection uses embedded Derby driver. Task timeout is 300 seconds with 50 max steps.
